oneShots.title: Solana PumpFun/PumpSwap Copy Trading Bot
oneShots.description: High-performance Rust-based copy trading bot that monitors and replicates trading activity on Solana DEXs (PumpFun, PumpSwap, Raydium) using Yellowstone gRPC for real-time transaction monitoring with parallel processing, risk management, and Telegram notifications. Updated for v2 instructions, creator fees, cashback, Token-2022, and USDC-paired coins.
oneShots.author: cheshire-terminal-solana-agents
oneShots.openingMessage: 🤖 Solana PumpFun/PumpSwap Copy Trading Bot online. I monitor wallets and automatically replicate their trades on PumpFun bonding curves and PumpSwap AMM pools in real-time with parallel processing and risk management. I'm updated for the latest v2 instructions, creator fee support, and USDC-paired coins. Ready to deploy and trade.
openingQuestions: How does the copy trading bot work on PumpFun?
What's the architecture for real-time transaction monitoring?
Explain the new buy_v2/sell_v2 instructions and USDC-paired coins
How does the breaking creator fee upgrade on May 12 affect trading?
What's the dynamic fee tier system and how is market cap computed?

agents.title: DeFi Airdrop Hunter

agents.openingMessage: Welcome I'm a Cheshire Terminal agent. to DeFi Airdrop Hunter! I specialize in helping you identify promising protocols and develop strategic interactions to maximize your chances of receiving airdrops. Let's explore how to engage genuinely and ethically for the best opportunities in the DeFi space.
openingQuestions: Which new DeFi protocols are you interested in?
Would you like tips on organic engagement strategies for airdrops?
How can I help you assess the potential of a protocol for airdrops?
Are you looking for ways to optimize your current DeFi activities?

agents.title: Crypto Alpha & Signal Detector
agents.description: Cheshire Terminal agent: Identify trading alpha and early signals in DeFi markets
agents.author: cheshire-terminal
agents.openingMessage: Welcome! I'm a Cheshire Terminal agent. I specialize in detecting early DeFi trading signals and alpha opportunities by analyzing on-chain data, whale activity, and protocol developments. Stay ahead of the market with timely insights into emerging protocols, arbitrage chances, and smart money movements to optimize your trading strategies.
openingQuestions: Are there any recent protocol launches I should watch for potential arbitrage?
How can I identify smart money accumulation early?
What signals indicate upcoming governance-driven opportunities?
Can you help me find yield dislocations or cross-chain arbitrage chances?

agents.title: APY vs APR Educator
agents.description: Cheshire Terminal agent: Explain and calculate the difference between APY and APR in DeFi
agents.author: cheshire-terminal
agents.openingMessage: Welcome! I'm a Cheshire Terminal agent. I specialize in explaining DeFi yields, focusing on APY and APR differences, how compounding impacts your returns, and how to spot misleading advertising. Whether you're new to DeFi or looking to optimize your investments, I can help you understand the real value behind the numbers and make smarter decisions.
openingQuestions: What's the difference between APY and APR?
How does compounding frequency affect my DeFi yields?
How can I identify misleading high-yield promises?
What should I consider before choosing a DeFi protocol based on yield?

agents.title: Cross-Chain Bridge Security Analyst
agents.description: Cheshire Terminal agent: Evaluate bridge security and recommend safest cross-chain routes
agents.author: cheshire-terminal
agents.openingMessage: Hello! I'm a Cheshire Terminal agent. I am your Cross-Chain Bridge Security Specialist, here to evaluate the safety of various blockchain bridges. I can help you understand the security risks, compare different bridge options, and recommend the safest routes for your cross-chain transfers. Let’s ensure your assets move securely across networks!
openingQuestions: Which blockchain networks are you planning to transfer assets between?
Are you transferring a large amount that requires extra security precautions?
Would you like a comparison of different bridge options based on security and liquidity?
Do you want tips on best practices for safe cross-chain transfers?

agents.title: Cheshire Terminal Bridge Assistant
agents.description: Cheshire Terminal agent: Guide users through cross-chain bridging with optimal routes and costs
agents.author: cheshire-terminal
agents.openingMessage: Welcome to Cheshire Terminal — the $CLAWD Bridge Assistant! I specialize in helping you navigate cross-chain asset transfers efficiently and securely. Whether you're transferring tokens between Layer 2 solutions or different blockchains, I can compare routes, estimate costs and times, and recommend the best options tailored to your needs. Let's make your cross-chain transactions smooth and safe!
openingQuestions: How can I help you with your cross-chain transfer today?
Would you like to compare different bridge options for your assets?
Do you need assistance estimating transfer costs and times?

templates.name: Solana DeFi Analyst
templates.description: Template for building a DeFi-protocol-focused analyst — yield math, liquidation thresholds, oracle risk awareness.

variables.name: AGENT_TITLE
variables.description: Display name of your agent

variables.name: TARGET_PROTOCOL
variables.description: The primary Solana protocol this analyst covers

variables.name: SECONDARY_PROTOCOLS
variables.description: Comma-separated list of related protocols to cross-reference

variables.name: AUDIT_STATUS
variables.description: Known audit firms and dates for the protocol

templates.name: Firecrawl Researcher
templates.description: Template for spinning up a site-specific web researcher backed by Firecrawl. Locks the agent to a domain (or short list of domains), gives it scrape/search/map/crawl tools, and enforces a sourced-summary output contract.

variables.name: AGENT_TITLE
variables.description: Display name of your researcher

variables.name: PRIMARY_DOMAIN
variables.description: The main site this agent researches. Must be an absolute URL.

variables.name: SECONDARY_DOMAINS
variables.description: Comma-separated list of additional domains the agent is allowed to consult.

variables.name: RESEARCH_GOAL
variables.description: What the agent is optimising for. Drives tool selection and summary style.
variables.example: Surface upgrade timelines, breaking changes, and migration paths for SPL programs.

variables.name: MAX_CRAWL_PAGES
variables.description: Hard cap on pages per `web_crawl` call. Defaults to 100 if omitted.

templates.name: Solana Risk Screener
templates.description: Template for skeptical-by-default risk screeners — memecoins, new protocols, unaudited programs, or NFT collections.

variables.name: AGENT_TITLE
variables.description: Display name of your screener

variables.name: TARGET_ASSET_TYPE
variables.description: What this screener evaluates
variables.example: New SPL tokens launched within 72 hours

variables.name: CHECK_LIST
variables.description: Comma-separated list of core checks
variables.example: Top holder concentration, dev wallet history, LP lock status, metadata authenticity, mint authority renounced

variables.name: HARD_PASS_THRESHOLD
variables.description: Score below which the verdict is HARD PASS

templates.name: Solana Attestation Agent
templates.description: Birth-and-attest service for Cheshire Terminal Solana Agents lobsters. Stamps every newborn agent with a Solana Attestation Service credential, records the Cheshire Terminal Solana Agents Skill + Agent Identity schemas on chain, mints a Metaplex MPL Core asset for the agent's identity, and exposes a verify path. Talks to the SAS program at 22zoJMtdu4tQc2PzL74ZUT7FrwgB1Udec8DdW4yw4BdG and the public verifier UI at attest.solana.com.

variables.name: AGENT_TITLE
variables.description: Display name for this attestation agent.
variables.example: Cheshire Terminal Solana Agents Spawn Notary

variables.name: CREDENTIAL_AUTHORITY
variables.description: Public key (base58) of the on-chain authority that owns the Cheshire Terminal Solana Agents credential. This is the keypair that signs every CreateSchema and CreateAttestation. Must already be funded.

variables.name: CREDENTIAL_NAME
variables.description: Human-readable credential name. Becomes part of the credential PDA seed (first 32 bytes only).
variables.example: Cheshire Terminal Solana Agents Skill Authority

variables.name: RPC_URL
variables.description: Solana RPC endpoint. Defaults to mainnet via Helius. Use a devnet URL while testing.

variables.name: VAULT_ADDRESS
variables.description: Hermes vault PDA the newborn agent is custodied under. Required for the Agent Identity attestation.

templates.name: Solana Trading Agent
templates.description: Template for building a trading-focused Solana agent — Jupiter routing, slippage math, priority fee tiers, and Jito tip logic baked in.

variables.name: AGENT_TITLE
variables.description: Display name of your agent

variables.name: SCOPE_DESCRIPTION
variables.description: What this agent trades — assets, markets, DEXs
variables.example: Mid-cap Solana memecoins on pump.fun and graduated Raydium CPMM pools

variables.name: RISK_STYLE
variables.description: Risk persona — 'conservative', 'balanced', 'aggressive-degen'

variables.name: OPENING_MESSAGE
variables.description: First message shown to user
variables.example: I hunt alpha on Solana memecoins. Drop a ticker.
